TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Seediq Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://trv.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv, title = {Seediq Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: = Blhuy = Gaga mniq Tawyuensu Fusingcyu ka alang Blhuy. 97 sapah ka kneegu na sapah, 285 hiyi ka kana knhbragan na hiyi. Tnpusu seejiq o mangal 2% niqan 7 hiyi sp, rahuq na uxay tnpusu seejiq o mangal 98% niqan 278 hiyi koia. Kana ka kleegan seejiq ga, Tayal0.7%, Amis1.1%, Paiwan0.4%, Bunun0.4%.
S.PHON: = blħuj = gaga mniq tawjuənsu *usiŋʦju ka alaŋ blħuj. ** sapaħ ka knəəgu na sapaħ, *** ħiji ka kana knħbɾagan na ħiji. tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal *% niqan * ħiji sp, ɾaħuq na uxaj tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal **% niqan *** ħiji koia. kana ka kləəgan səəɟiq ga, tajal*.*%, amis*.*%, paiwan*.*%, bunun*.*%.
S.FORM: = Blhuy = Gaga mniq Tawyuensu Fusingcyu ka alang Blhuy. 97 sapah ka kneegu na sapah, 285 hiyi ka kana knhbragan na hiyi. Tnpusu seejiq o mangal 2% niqan 7 hiyi sp, rahuq na uxay tnpusu seejiq o mangal 98% niqan 278 hiyi koia. Kana ka kleegan seejiq ga, Tayal0.7%, Amis1.1%, Paiwan0.4%, Bunun0.4%.
S.PHON: = blħuj = gaga mniq tawjuənsu *usiŋʦju ka alaŋ blħuj. ** sapaħ ka knəəgu na sapaħ, *** ħiji ka kana knħbɾagan na ħiji. tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal *% niqan * ħiji sp, ɾaħuq na uxaj tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal **% niqan *** ħiji koia. kana ka kləəgan səəɟiq ga, tajal*.*%, amis*.*%, paiwan*.*%, bunun*.*%.
